name: Swiss Crabwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast almonds until lightly browned.
2. Toast split buns.
3. In a bowl, stir together sour cream, mayonnaise, dry mustard, lemon juice, garlic powder, pepper, and nutmeg until well blended.
4. Add crumbled bacon, sliced green onions, crabmeat, and shredded Swiss cheese to the mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Spread about 1/3 cup of the mixture on each roll half.
6. Place the rolls on a baking sheet and broil 6 inches from heat for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Serve as open-faced sandwiches, with 2 per person.
